spellcasting.spellsKnown: All spells in spellbook (prepare INT mod + level)

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You can cast wizard spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability.

1.name: Arcane Recovery
1.description: Once per day during a short rest, you can recover spell slots with a combined level equal to half your wizard level (rounded up).

2.name: Arcane Tradition
2.description: Choose a school of magic: Abjuration, Conjuration, Divination, Enchantment, Evocation, Illusion, Necromancy, or Transmutation.

Abjuration.name: School of Abjuration
Abjuration.description: When you cast an abjuration spell, you create a protective ward. The ward has HP equal to twice your wizard level + INT modifier.

Conjuration.name: School of Conjuration
Conjuration.description: You can use an action to conjure an inanimate object in your hand or on the ground. The object is visibly magical and vanishes after 1 hour.

Divination.name: School of Divination
Divination.description: When you finish a long rest, roll two d20s and record the numbers. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by you or a creature that you can see with one of these foretelling rolls.

Enchantment.name: School of Enchantment
Enchantment.description: As an action, choose one creature within 5 feet. If it fails a Wisdom save, it is charmed until the end of your next turn.

Evocation.name: School of Evocation
Evocation.description: When you cast an evocation spell that affects other creatures, you can choose a number of them equal to 1 + the spell's level. Those creatures automatically succeed on their saving throws and take no damage.

Illusion.name: School of Illusion
Illusion.description: You learn the Minor Illusion cantrip. When you cast it, you can create both a sound and an image with a single casting.

Necromancy.name: School of Necromancy
Necromancy.description: When you kill a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, you regain HP equal to twice the spell's level (three times if Necromancy).

Transmutation.name: School of Transmutation
Transmutation.description: You can temporarily alter the physical properties of one nonmagical object, changing it from one substance to another.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: You can cast sorcerer spells. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

1.name: Sorcerous Origin
1.description: Choose the source of your innate magic: Draconic Bloodline, Wild Magic, or other origin.

2.name: Font of Magic
2.description: You have sorcery points equal to your sorcerer level. You can use these to create spell slots or fuel Metamagic.

3.name: Metamagic
3.description: Choose two Metamagic options. You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it.

Draconic Bloodline.name: Draconic Bloodline
Draconic Bloodline.description: Your innate magic comes from draconic ancestry. Choose a dragon type; you gain resistance to that damage type and bonus HP.
Draconic Bloodline.featureDescription: Your HP maximum increases by 1 for each sorcerer level. Your unarmored AC equals 13 + DEX modifier.

Wild Magic.name: Wild Magic
Wild Magic.description: Your magic is volatile and unpredictable, surging with chaotic energy.
Wild Magic.featureDescription: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher, the DM can have you roll a d20. On a 1, roll on the Wild Magic Surge table.

Lunar Sorcery.name: Lunar Sorcery
Lunar Sorcery.description: Your magic is tied to the moons of Krynn — Solinari, Lunitari, and Nuitari.
Lunar Sorcery.featureDescription: You can attune to one of the three moons, gaining benefits based on which moon is dominant.

metamagic.name: Careful Spell
metamagic.description: Allies auto-succeed on saves against your spells

metamagic.name: Distant Spell
metamagic.description: Double the range of a spell

metamagic.name: Empowered Spell
metamagic.description: Reroll damage dice equal to CHA mod

metamagic.name: Extended Spell
metamagic.description: Double the duration of a spell

metamagic.name: Heightened Spell
metamagic.description: One target has disadvantage on first save

metamagic.name: Quickened Spell
metamagic.description: Cast a spell as a bonus action

metamagic.name: Subtle Spell
metamagic.description: Cast without verbal or somatic components

metamagic.name: Twinned Spell
metamagic.description: Target a second creature with a single-target spell
